title: Create: Buzzy Bees
description: Factorio style robots for your create world!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66cb0547b31b81e45131479c263a7ddfa53d47e7.png)

Place schematics ingame using Mechanical Bees and transport your items just like in Factorio
 

# Main features:
- Mechanical Beehive: Distribute bees to help you build your schematics
- Mechanical Bees: Place blocks in your schematic, collect items from inventories and more!
- Construction planner: Manage all your schematics and keep an overview.
- Portable Beehive: Always have your bees close to you.


 

# Other features:
## Construction & Deconstruction:                                                                                                      
- Load any schematic and deploy a bee swarm to build it automatically. Select areas for removal, bees break blocks top-down and return the drops
- Bees fetch materials from Logistics Ports attached to your storage
# Item Transport:                                                    
- Mechanical Bumble Bees shuttle items between Cargo Ports using configurable
This is a beta for now. Some bugs might occur, please report them accordingly.
